Author: mole99
Content:
Hi Andrew, atm the only output is the stitched GDS.
Please let me know what other data you require besides the manifest and the tile map. Both file formats are subject to change, however major changes take time, and the goal is to stitch the final reticle by end of next week.

The tile map grad is based on the smallest slot size, i.e., the quarter slot. This means that half-slot projects are two tiles large and full-slot projects are 2x2 tiles. The shuttle assignment from the [online platform](https://platform.wafer.space/shuttles/G801/assign) needs to be converted to this format.

What output would you need for the dicing plan?

Author: mole99
Content: @Tim 'mithro' Ansell Could you give Andrew access to the current shuttle assignment on the platform?
